description.en: A string representing the type of the audio session. Possible values include"auto","playback","transient","transient-solo","ambient", and"play-and-record".

excerpt.es: A string representing the type of the audio session. Possible values include"auto","playback","transient","transient-solo","ambient", and"play-and-record".
